2213830.name: The Fallen Night
2213830.description:
Next Update:

The Middle Ages was the harshest period in human history, but we want to tell you another story, your own story, with the help of the innovative "Generative History" system. Experience endless adventures, fun, brutal battles, and a bit of charisma with the first video game in history to offer infinite entertainment. And of course, thanks to its innovative "Infinite Entertainment" system, experience romance, betrayal, act as a good Samaritan, and be the hero of your own story. And remember this: "Man does not live by fighting alone."

Important Note: The game currently lacks entertainment and has several bugs that can ruin the experience, so we recommend waiting for update 1.0.0.5. TFN had a rushed launch due to a debt related to the operation of an animal, but keep in mind that after the update the price may increase to be fair to those who have already purchased it. We appreciate your patience and trust.

The Fallen Night is a medieval action game with a quality combat system based on research, something that can amaze you, with a great aspiration, to become an Online RPG, it is also a multi-genre game capable of giving you a variety of entertainment (this feature is currently disabled).

Authentic Experience

We believe it is the authentic experience of a medieval battle because just as martial arts have shown on the streets, there is always a wild instinct in our actions under stress, in addition to the fact that the vast majority carried an axe or a mace and not a sword because they were better at piercing armor.

Modular Experience

Whether you want to play story mode, MMORPG, or skirmish, you can still adjust the game settings for a more personalized gameplay and greater satisfaction, whether by removing magic or increasing realism.

Includes:

7 Maps (2 integrated maps to optimize)

2 Modes (+5 Mode in development)

4 Mode Decorator

8 Armies (+6 Armies in development)

Offline Features (+Online Features in Development)

+50 Weapons To Select

Knight, Archer, Warrior and Paladin Class

2 Apps:

The Fallen Night

The Fallen Night Remastered (Once TFNR has been launched)

Update 1.0.0.5 (coming soon):

Online Functions

Story Mode

MMORPG Mode

Access to story mode jobs (Guard, Patrol and Field Soldier)

Armor Damage (Knight)

Difficulty of Bots (Rookies, Professionals, Veterans and Legends)

New Weapons

New Tricks

New Audio Effects (Voices)

Spy, Monk, Elite, Speakman and Pikerman Class

In Development:

13 Versions of the game TFN (Story, Skirmish, Commander, 3D Fight, 2D Fight, Platform, Minigames, Apocalipyse, Chess, MOBA, Crusades, MMORPG and Brawls)

Love relationships.

Possibility to select your character.

Ninja and Berserker class.
2213830.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
